external_lookup.reason: External lookup is disabled by default. Re-run with --enable-external-lookup to allow live online lookup.

formula_proposals.convention: Follow the narrow local PyQUDA path: read a Chroma/QIO gauge, copy it, evolve it with wilsonFlowChroma(flow_steps, flow_epsilon), and save the returned energy-history array as npy.
formula_proposals.correlator: E(t) \ \mathrm{sampled\ along\ the\ discrete\ Wilson-flow\ trajectory}
formula_proposals.label: Wilson-flow energy-density history for a gauge field

inferred_interpretation.label: wilson-flow energy observable
inferred_interpretation.summary: User explicitly asked for a Wilson-flow / gradient-flow gauge evolution path.

live_online_lookup.note: Live online lookup is opt-in and only used when local PyQUDA evidence is insufficient for the physics-side target definition.

local_curated_citations.note: Curated local JSON citations are available and may be attached to the physics artifact or implementation plan.

model_inference.note: Model inference may be used for normalization or formula/operator explanation when an LLM backend is configured.

true_online_lookup.note: Legacy boundary label retained for compatibility. The active opt-in capability is recorded under knowledge_boundary.live_online_lookup.

llm_assistance.selection_reason: Skipped backend-assisted interpretation because the request already contains a confirmed physics target and enough runnable task fields for grounded PyQUDA generation.
